replies.msg:
Jurgen Klopp has been speaking to Sky Sports about Virgil van Dijk

On what Van Dijk will bring:
Quality. That’s why we got him. That’s why we were interested. It’s quite difficult at the moment because he is technically still a player of Southampton. I will have much more time and opportunities to talk about him.

On the price-tag:
I can imagine people think ‘wow, what a number this is’ but of course for me this is not interesting, we don’t make the prices, the market makes the prices and the first thing all Liverpool supporters should forget is the price.

“We only talk about the player and what he can bring. It’s quality, it’s character, it’s mentality and all that stuff. That’s why we are really happy.”

On getting back to his best: “It’s a long term thing. Look he had probably not his best half of a season in Southampton, he was very long injured and then we all know about the things that happened last summer.

“He’s a tall player, they always need a little bit longer, especially after nine months or so. So he needs rhythm but that’s not a problem because we already have quality in this position.

We don’t have to rush anything, he needs to adapt to our style of play, it’s completely different. But we are 100 percent sure he will do it. So I am very happy about the fact it’s finally done, but otherwise there’s no rush.

今年夏天，一直傳出巴塞隆拿擬邀菲臘比古天奴加盟，如今冬季轉會窗即將重開，巴塞隨時再出手向利物浦挖角。然而，曾效力巴塞隆拿及皇家馬德里的朗拿度（Ronaldo）最近接受訪問時指，奉勸古天奴巴塞未必是這位巴西同胞的最佳落腳點。

「即使我在巴塞隆拿度過美滿一年，但與皇馬相比，我感到更愉快。我在巴塞以不愉快告終，情況與尼馬相似。」朗拿度接受巴西媒體《Esporte Interativo》訪問表示，「巴塞與巴西球員總有問題出現，尼馬、羅馬里奧、朗拿甸奴以及我。無論我們如何付出與貢獻，會方最後都愧對我們。」
